final_prompt.prompt:
Create a UI mockup for an e-commerce landing page hero section for a Japanese beauty brand.

Style/medium: clean flat UI design, modern SaaS aesthetic, feminine beauty brand visual language, soft gradients
Composition: full-width hero section layout with three-column grid — left text content, center model portrait, right product cards and stats
Subject: young East Asian woman smiling while touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of moisturizing serum
Scene/backdrop: airy studio environment with soft purple floral accents, minimal white background with subtle pink gradient wash
Lighting/mood: soft diffused daylight from upper left, bright and welcoming mood, no harsh shadows
Color palette: soft pink as primary, white as base, purple flowers as accent, gold for stat card highlights
Materials/textures: smooth matte UI surfaces, subtle drop shadows on cards, clean sans-serif typography
Text (verbatim): "LUMEA BEAUTY", "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。", "敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える", "美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア", "初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >", "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", "満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破", "うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ", "特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ", "今すぐ試す"
Constraints: must display all UI elements as a cohesive landing page mockup; navigation bar at top; pill-shaped badges with icons; pink checkmarks for bullet points; floating stat cards with gold accents; rounded benefit cards at bottom
Avoid: photorealistic 3D renders; stock photo look; cluttered layout; dark mode; neon colors; generic placeholder text
